articles.PB-1: All active repos MUST follow the dual-repo pattern: private dev repo for all development, public pub repo as read-only mirror
articles.PB-2: Public publication repos MUST NOT receive direct pushes; all updates MUST flow through the publish script from the dev repo
articles.PB-3: Internal artifacts (.specify/, specs/, .private/, instructions/, devinstructions/, docs/archive/, tests/outputs/, state/, logs/, feedback/, governance/, memory/, metrics/) MUST be excluded from publication via .publish-exclude
articles.PB-4: Publishes MUST be release-aligned; the publish script MUST be used (no ad-hoc file copies or direct pushes)
articles.PB-5: Public repos MUST have issues, wiki, and projects disabled; CONTRIBUTING.md MUST explain the contribution policy
articles.PB-6: Dev repos MUST have a pre-push hook that queries GitHub API for repo visibility and blocks pushes to public remotes; bypass via PUBLISH_OVERRIDE=1 is reserved for the publish script only
